item.title: Conjunctival ulcer in Crohn's disease: a complete slit-lamp photography follow-up.
Identifying key predictors of metastatic cutaneous Crohn's disease: a case-control study.
item.description: The American journal of gastroenterology — Metastatic cutaneous Crohn's Disease (MCD) is a rare cutaneous manifestation of Crohn's Disease with significant morbidity, yet understanding is limited to case reports and small series. We aimed t...

item.title: Distinct phenotype of primary sclerosing cholangitis-associated inflammatory bowel disease.
item.description: Journal of gastroenterology — Primary sclerosing cholangitis (PSC) is frequently accompanied by colitis with clinicopathologic features that differ from conventional inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). Accumulating evidence indic...
